<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs focused — one logical change each. -->

## What & why
<!-- What does this change, and why? Link any related issue, e.g. Closes #12 -->

## Type of change
- [ ] New template
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Eval
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist
- [ ] `mise run validate` passes.
- [ ] If this is behavior-related, I considered an eval case in `evals/`.

### For a new template
- [ ] Self-contained — all CSS/JS/SVG inlined, **no external resources**.
- [ ] Uses `<!-- REPLACE: … -->` markers for editable regions.
- [ ] Renders standalone in a browser (sensible placeholder content).
- [ ] Registered in **both** `assets/templates/README.md` and the table in `SKILL.md`.
